sections.title: If the player has less than 70% Shayzien favour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: Don't expect me to deal with the likes of you.

sections.title: If the player has less than 70% Shayzien favour and 20 Defence

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: If you're planning on fighting me for a set of my armour, I'm afraid I'm not interested. The combat XP from fighting you isn't worthwhile. Get a Defence level of 20 first.

sections.title: If the player does not have a full set of tier 1 armour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: If you're hoping to fight me for a piece of my armour, you've got to own a full set of the tier 1 armour first. Try fighting my subordinate.

sections.title: If the player has a full set of tier 1 armour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: Fancy a fight? The combat practice would be good for me. I'll give you a piece of my armour if you win.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: I'll be here if you ever change your mind. I love a good fight.

sections.title: If the player does not have the full set of tier 2 armour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: Fancy another fight? The combat practice is good for me. I'll give you some more of my armour if you win.

sections.title: If the player has the full set of tier 2 armour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: Don't you already have a set of my armour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's fight again - I don't mind duplicates.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I guess I needn't fight you again.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 2)
lines.text: I'll be here if you ever change your mind.

sections.title: If talked to whilst fighting another soldier
